privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample database for SQL Server, Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and DB2 (available at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database). The media-related data (tracks, albums, artists) is based on real iTunes Library data, while customer and sales data are synthetically generated. The database contains 59 total customers organized into 19 cohorts. A cohort retention analysis query executed against this database returns 323 rows with the required columns (CohortMonth, MonthNumber, CohortSize, ActiveCustomers, RetentionPct). The largest cohort is 2021-01 with 6 customers. All Month 0 (first purchase month) rows show 100% retention, as expected by definition. The minimum row requirement (50) is satisfied with 323 actual rows.
